languages.text: "Проверка закончена. Вы полностью здоровы и можете исполнять свой долг без всяких физических препятствий. Но... прошу вас, берегите себя в бою. Будьте милосердны к своему телу. Даже избранники Его уязвимы к оружию врагов Челочества".
languages.translation_comment: после ЗТМ, бафф на то, чтобы первая травма не проходила по игроку

traits.locale_text: "Спешу обрадовать: сложные обстоятельства не навредили аугментам. Но... Прошу вас как человек, кого более всего на свете заботит внутреннее состояние ваших членов: не забывайте отдыхать. Выпейте очищенной воды, примите ванную со священными маслами. Будьте к милосердны к великолепному телу, что даровал вам Император".

languages.translation_comment: после ЗТМ, бафф на то, чтобы первая травма не проходила по игроку

languages.text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."
languages.original_text: "Проверка закончена. Вы полностью здоровы и можете исполнять свой долг без всяких физических препятствий. Но... прошу вас, берегите себя в бою. Будьте милосердны к своему телу. Даже избранники Его уязвимы к оружию врагов Челочества".

"The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

"The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

languages.text: 「検査は終了。あなたは完全に健康で、身体的な支障なく任務を遂行できる。しかし…戦闘では、ご自身の体を大切に。人類の敵の武器は、選ばれた者さえも傷つける」
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「検査は終了。あなたは完全に健康で、身体的な支障なく任務を遂行できる。しかし…戦闘では、ご自身の体を大切に。人類の敵の武器は、選ばれた者さえも傷つける。」

languages.text: "İnceleme bitti. Tamamen sağlıklısınız ve vazifelerinizi herhangi bir fiziksel engel olmadan yerine getirebilirsiniz. Fakat... Lütfen savaşta kendinize dikkat edin. Vücudunuza merhamet edin. O'nun seçilmişleri bile İnsanlığın düşmanlarının silahlarına karşı savunmasızdır."
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: "İnceleme bitti. Tamamen sağlıklısınız ve vazifelerinizi herhangi bir fiziksel engel olmadan yerine getirebilirsiniz. Fakat... Lütfen savaşta kendinize dikkat edin. Vücudunuza merhamet edin. O'nun seçilmişleri bile İnsanlığın düşmanlarının silahlarına karşı savunmasızdır."

languages.text: «Comprobación lista. Está en perfecta salud y puede realizar sus deberes sin ningún impedimento físico. Pero... tenga cuidado en combate. Sea amable con su cuerpo. Incluso Sus elegidos son vulnerables a las armas de los enemigos de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Comprobación lista. Está en perfecta salud y puede realizar sus deberes sin ningún impedimento físico. Pero... tenga cuidado en combate. Sea amable con su cuerpo. Incluso Sus elegidos son vulnerables a las armas de los enemigos de la Humanidad».

languages.text: “检查结束了。您非常健康，履行职责时不会有任何身体障碍。但是……在战斗中还请注意保重自己，对您的身体仁慈一些。即便是神皇的神选者，在人类之敌的武器面前也是脆弱的。”
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: “检查结束了。您非常健康，履行职责时不会有任何身体障碍。但是……在战斗中还请注意保重自己，对您的身体仁慈一些。即便是神皇的神选者，在人类之敌的武器面前也是脆弱的。”

languages.text: « L'examen est terminé. Vous êtes en parfaite santé, {mf|exempt|exempte} de tout trouble physique qui pourrait entraver l'exercice de vos fonctions. Cela dit... je vous prie de faire preuve de prudence au combat. Ménagez votre corps. Même les élus de l'Empereur sont vulnérables aux armes des ennemis de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."

traits.locale_text: « L'examen est terminé. Vous êtes en parfaite santé, {mf|exempt|exempte} de tout trouble physique qui pourrait entraver l'exercice de vos fonctions. Cela dit... je vous prie de faire preuve de prudence au combat. Ménagez votre corps. Même les élus de l'Empereur sont vulnérables aux armes des ennemis de l'humanité. »

languages.text: "Die Untersuchung ist abgeschlossen. Ihr seid bei bester Gesundheit und könnt Eure Pflichten ohne jede körperliche Einschränkung erfüllen. Aber ... seid bitte im Kampf vorsichtig. Seid gnädig zu Eurem Körper. Selbst Seine Auserkorenen sind verwundbar durch die Waffen der Feinde der Menschheit."
languages.original_text: "The review is over. You are completely healthy and can perform your duties without any physical hindrance. But... please take care of yourself in combat. Be merciful to your body. Even His chosen are vulnerable to the weapons of the enemies of Humanity."
